content: {"key_findings": ["Round 3 significantly expanded Ramadan coverage (25x) — the free-living observational counterweight to AHA 2024 NHANES signal is now solidly grounded", "Academic query spike (49 results) covered methodological and long-duration RCT angles", "NHANES-focused content remains at 2x mentions; the AHA 2024 Zhong abstract is known but not deeply fetched — search diminishing returns", "Regulatory depth (FTC/EFSA/FDA) stalled after Round 2; additional querying unlikely to return substantive new material", "Perspective entropy has reached acceptable breadth across Scientific, Public_Health, Regional, Methodological, Industry, Emerging_Trends"], "perspective_gaps": [], "web_queries": [], "academic_queries": [], "exa_queries": [], "convergence_assessment": "saturated", "should_continue": false, "reasoning": "After 3 rounds and ~300 fetched URLs, the evidence base now spans all principal STORM perspectives. Remaining gaps (deep LMIC trial body, comprehensive long-duration prospective cohort for AHA 2024) reflect real absence in the literature rather than pipeline undercoverage. Continuing would yield redundant sources and delay synthesis. Converge.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Long-duration (>12 month) prospective cohort IF cardiovascular mortality data beyond AHA 2024 NHANES abstract — reflects absence in literature, not pipeline limitation", "LMIC-specific IF RCTs in metabolic syndrome remain sparse across all queried databases", "Head-to-head IF vs GLP-1 RA RCTs not yet completed in the field"]}
